perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with tattoos on his arms, wearing a black T-shirt and gold chains, enters a room and yells at a woman sitting at a table. (2) The woman pulls out a 100-yuan bill; the man looks angry but takes it. She continues to pull out more money (1000-yuan bills), and the man's expression changes to a greedy smile. (3) The man then transitions into presenting a skincare product, a white tube of facial cleanser. (4) There is a montage of the man washing his face in a bathroom, showing the product's application. (5) The scene shifts back to a table where multiple brown glass bottles of serum (5%, 10%, 18%, 30%) are displayed and explained by the man. (6) The man demonstrates body spray and lotion. (7) Finally, both the man and the woman appear together on screen, with the man holding up a stack of money and giving a thumbs up.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Loud knocking sound followed by an upbeat, fast-tempo background music. A male voice is heard shouting in an exaggerated, aggressive tone. (2) The sound of paper rustling as money is handed over. The male voice shifts from angry to high-pitched, excited laughter. (3) The music remains upbeat. The male voice becomes fast-paced and persuasive, explaining product features. (4) Sound of running water and splashing as the man washes his face. (5) The male voice continues a continuous monologue with occasional short responses from a female voice. (6) SFX like 'ding' or whooshing sounds punctuate transitions between product displays.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'Miss Wang', 'About time', 'Drinking afternoon tea during work'. (2) Decorative/Effect Text: '??', 'Who?', 'Money Ability ATK: 10', 'ATK: 99', 'ATK: 99999999999'. (3) Product Names: 'Dr. Douxi', 'Mandelic Acid Facial Cleanse', '5% / 10% / 18% / 30% Mandelic Acid Essence'. (4) Feature Text: 'Combined facial cleanser', 'White willow bark extract', 'Improve acne and large pores'. (5) CTA Text: 'Cai Aga Discount Group Buy', 'Go to the link to order now!'

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook (Comedy Skit) -> Product Introduction -> Product Demonstration -> Comparison of variants -> Call to Action

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator with tattoos, 1 female character (Miss Wang) sitting.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Male: Mid-30s, brown hair, heavy tattoos on both arms, wearing multiple gold and silver chains, black T-shirt. Female: Young woman, short dark hair, wearing a striped shirt over a graphic tee.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A room with shelves displaying sneakers in boxes and Dragon Ball figurines (Goku/Vegeta). A clean, white bathroom with a mirror.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video uses a humorous skit involving 'money power' to grab attention before transitioning into a detailed product endorsement for Dr. Douxi skincare products, focusing on their Mandelic Acid line for facial and body care.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of product packaging, demonstration of use, and a specific group-buy offer mentioned at the end.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Cai Aga's signature high-energy shouting, tattoos, and interaction with his team member 'Miss Wang'.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video blends comedy with commercial content, typical of Taiwanese influencer marketing styles.
